summary: Frontend-only testing of TF (timeframe) bug fix in MultiChartLayout.jsx. Verified that changing TF dropdown in chart slots triggers correct Groww API params (interval/days_back) instead of the old wrong params (timespan/multiplier). All 7 TF scenarios tested and PASSED. Bug fix confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: MultiChartLayout.jsx GROWW_INTV_MAP correctly maps all TF labels to Groww interval strings (e.g., '15M'->'15m', '1H'->'1h', '1W'->'1w')
GROWW_DAYS_MAP correctly sets days_back per TF (15M->15, 1H->60, 5M->10, 1W->400, 30M->25, 4H->150)
On Groww API failure, fallback to yfinance stock/bars is correctly chained (catch block at line 181)
Note: GROWW_INTV_MAP in MultiChartLayout has more entries (2M, 3M, 45M, 2H, 1MO) than TradingDashboard's intvMap — this is fine, MultiChartLayout is more complete
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for TF params in MultiChartLayout.jsx is verified working. The GROWW_INTV_MAP and GROWW_DAYS_MAP lookup tables correctly translate TF labels to Groww API params. All tested timeframes (1D, 15M, 1H, 5M, 1W, 30M, 4H) send correct interval and days_back to /api/groww/candles/{symbol}. 2-chart and 4-chart layouts also work independently. The main search uses data-testid='stock-search-input' and results use data-testid='search-result-{idx}'. TF trigger is data-testid='tf-trigger', individual TF buttons are data-testid='tf-{label}' (e.g., 'tf-15M').
